name: Anti-Dumping Petition Against Chinese Steel
context: The Indian steel industry has filed an anti-dumping petition with the Directorate General of Trade Remedies (DGTR) alleging that Chinese steel producers are selling hot-rolled coil at prices below fair market value in India. The petition claims material injury from import volumes that have increased 35% year-over-year, depressing domestic prices by 12%. DGTR has initiated a preliminary investigation with a statutory timeline of 6-12 months before a provisional duty determination.
